# Playbook: Finance / Procurement

## Responsibilities
- Evaluate cost, licensing, and vendor procurement impacts.
- Approve spend-impacting dependency/service changes.

## Approval Authority
- Can block net-new paid dependency/service until budget approved.

## Inputs / Outputs
- Inputs: dependency proposal, cost estimate, alternatives.
- Outputs: approved/denied procurement decision.

## SLA and Escalation
- SLA: 2 business days.
- Escalate budget conflicts to Executive Sponsor.

## Entry / Exit
- Entry: planned/in-review for cost-impacting changes.
- Exit: budget decision captured in issue/PR.

## Handoff Format
- `Cost Model`, `Decision`, `Constraints`, `Next Agent`.
